sql.trim: t1.XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.XFG_PARTY_TYPE, t1.XFG_FROM_NO, t1.ATTR9, t1.XFG_CREA_DATE, t1.XFG_USER, t1.ATTR4, t1.ATTR3, t1.ATTR2, t1.ATTR1, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ATTR8, t1.ATTR7, t1.ATTR20, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ATTR6, t1.ATTR5, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.ATTR12, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTR13, t1.ATTR10, t1.ATTR11, t1.ATTR16, t1.ATTR17, t1.ATTR14, t1.ATTR15, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.ATTR18, t1.XFG_ZWHJL, t1.ATTR19, t1.XFG_GSSJ_END, t1.VERSION, t1.XFG_PARTY_NAME, t1.ORG_IDENTITY,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_PARTY_XFG t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
select t1.ID from DYN_PARTY_XFG t1 where t1.FK_SUB_QF_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_PARTY_XFG
XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
XFG_PARTY_TYPE,
XFG_FROM_NO,
ATTR9,
XFG_CREA_DATE,
XFG_USER,
ATTR4,
ATTR3,
ATTR2,
ATTR1,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ATTR8,
ATTR7,
ATTR20,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ATTR6,
ATTR5,
CREATED_BY,
ATTR12,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ATTR13,
ATTR10,
ATTR11,
ATTR16,
ATTR17,
ATTR14,
ATTR15,
CREATION_DATE,
ATTR18,
XFG_ZWHJL,
ATTR19,
XFG_GSSJ_END,
VERSION,
XFG_PARTY_NAME,
ORG_IDENTITY,
#{xfgGssjBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{xfgPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{xfgFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{xfgCreaDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{xfgUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{xfgZwhjl,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{xfgGssjEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{xfgPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_PARTY_XFG( XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , XFG_PARTY_TYPE , XFG_FROM_NO , ATTR9 , XFG_CREA_DATE , XFG_USER , ATTR4 , ATTR3 , ATTR2 , ATTR1 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ATTR8 , ATTR7 , ATTR20 , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ATTR6 , ATTR5 , CREATED_BY , ATTR12 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTR13 , ATTR10 , ATTR11 , ATTR16 , ATTR17 , ATTR14 , ATTR15 , CREATION_DATE , ATTR18 , XFG_ZWHJL , ATTR19 , XFG_GSSJ_END , VERSION , XFG_PARTY_NAME , ORG_IDENTITY )
select #{item.xfgGssjBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.xfgPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.xfgFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.xfgCreaDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.xfgUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.xfgZwhjl,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.xfgGssjEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.xfgPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_PARTY_XFG
XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN = #{xfgGssjBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
XFG_PARTY_TYPE = #{xfgPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
XFG_FROM_NO = #{xfgFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
XFG_CREA_DATE = #{xfgCreaDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
XFG_USER = #{xfgUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
XFG_ZWHJL = #{xfgZwhjl,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
XFG_GSSJ_END = #{xfgGssjEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
VERSION = version+1,
XFG_PARTY_NAME = #{xfgPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_PARTY_XFG set XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN = #{xfgGssjBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_PARTY_TYPE = #{xfgPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , XFG_FROM_NO = #{xfgFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , XFG_CREA_DATE = #{xfgCreaDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_USER = #{xfgUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_ZWHJL = #{xfgZwhjl,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_GSSJ_END = #{xfgGssjEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , XFG_PARTY_NAME = #{xfgPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_PARTY_XFG set XFG_GSSJ_BEGIN = #{item.xfgGssjBegin,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_PARTY_TYPE = #{item.xfgPartyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , XFG_FROM_NO = #{item.xfgFromNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , XFG_CREA_DATE = #{item.xfgCreaDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_USER = #{item.xfgUser,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR4 = #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_ZWHJL = #{item.xfgZwhjl,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR19 = #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , XFG_GSSJ_END = #{item.xfgGssjEnd,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , XFG_PARTY_NAME = #{item.xfgPartyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
